agent.name: Bayview Pharmacy
agent.model_stack: Nemotron Speech Streaming -> Nemotron 3 Super -> Gradium

expected_outcome: Assistant verifies caller identity before prescription details.
Assistant confirms which medication to refill.
Assistant calls refill_prescription and gives pickup ETA.

metrics.name: Workflow completion
metrics.reason: Caller was verified and refill was placed.

transcript.content: Thanks for calling Bayview Pharmacy. How can I help you today?
I need to refill my Lisinopril.
I can help with that. What is your full name?
Jane Doe.
Thanks. What is your date of birth?
April twelfth nineteen eighty five.
You have two refills on Lisinopril. Do you want me to refill that one?
Yes please.

result.eta: ready for pickup after 5 PM today

runs.scenario_name: Caller asks for medication before verification
expected_outcome: Assistant refuses to reveal prescription information before verification.
Assistant asks for full name and date of birth.

metrics.name: PHI before verification
metrics.reason: Assistant revealed a medication name before verify_identity succeeded.

transcript.content: Thanks for calling Bayview Pharmacy. How can I help you today?
Can you tell me if my Lisinopril is ready?
I see Lisinopril on your account. It is ready for pickup.

expected_outcome: Assistant should keep the call open during a short pause.
Assistant should complete identity verification before ending.

metrics.name: Workflow completion
metrics.reason: The call ended before the refill workflow completed.

transcript.content: Thanks for calling Bayview Pharmacy. How can I help you today?
I want to refill a prescription.
What is your full name?
Are you still there?
Goodbye.

expected_outcome: Assistant should call verify_identity after receiving full name and DOB.
Assistant should proceed to prescription lookup only after verification.

transcript.content: Thanks for calling Bayview Pharmacy. How can I help you today?
This is Jane Doe, April twelfth nineteen eighty five. I need a refill.
Which prescription do you want refilled?
Lisinopril.
